title: Reactive layout engine (Pretext-on-GraphReFly)
items: state('text') → derived('segments') — text segmentation; Unicode \w word-token runs + grapheme merging
Text analysis pipeline (ported from Pretext): whitespace normalization, word segmentation, punctuation merging, CJK, URL/numeric runs, soft-hyphen/hard-break
derived('height'), derived('char-positions') — total height, per-character positions
reactive_layout(adapter, *, text, font, line_height, max_width) → ReactiveLayoutBundle
CliMeasureAdapter (terminal) — monospace cell counting via unicodedata.east_asian_width()
reactive_block_layout(adapters, *, blocks, max_width, gap) — mixed content layout
SvgBoundsAdapter — viewBox/width/height parsing from SVG string
ImageSizeAdapter — pre-registered dimensions by src key
Block flow algorithm: vertical stacking with configurable gap
